/CAL: TRIAL/DAWT/X: THE DEFENSE COUNSEL FILES AN EXECUTED MILLS WAIVER/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 5 Y:PJ 3 D/CTS: 3/SA1: AMBER NABER/SA2: 55 PARK ST, SF/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT MUST NOT ENTER #4EMBARCADERO CENTER, SF/CTORD: UPON COMPLETION OF DEFENDANT'S 4 YEAR TOUR OF DUTY WITH US NAVY, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO COMPLETE AN ANGER MANAGEMENT COURSE IN THE STATE OF HIS RESIDENCE/SECFEE/VF1/BE/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/X: THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS NO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COMPONENT TO THE INCIDENTAND TO THE CHARGE TO WHICH THE DEFENDANT PLED GUILTY,/X: THE DEFENDANT ANDCOMPLAINING WITNESS ARE NOT RELATED IN ANY WAY,/X: THIS IS NOT A DOMESTICVIOLENCE CASE,/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:11-27-06/BAIL:50,000/SAORD/SA1:NABER, AMBER/SA2:STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM 55 PARK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/WEAP/DEF:MUST SURRENDER OR SELL ANY FIREARMS IN HIS POSSESSION/DEF:NOT TO CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL WHILE ON BAIL/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
